name: Shepherd's Pie 7
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut hot Italian sausages lengthwise in half and slice into 1/4 inch thick pieces.
2. Peel and cut potatoes into 1-inch chunks.
3. Place ground beef and sausages in a medium skillet. Cook, breaking up the meat over medium-high heat until it loses some of its pink color and releases juices.
4. Add tomatoes, mushrooms, garlic, and vinegar. Simmer uncovered, stirring occasionally and breaking up tomatoes for about 10 minutes.
5. Stir in peas, basil, 1/2 teaspoon salt, oregano, and pepper. Simmer for another 10 minutes.
6. Remove from heat. Boil potatoes in water to cover until tender (about 20 minutes), then drain.
7. Transfer boiled potatoes to a large mixing bowl. Beat in milk, grated Parmesan cheese, butter, remaining 1/2 teaspoon salt, and pepper to taste. Continue beating until smooth.
8. Preheat oven to 350°F.
9. Spoon the meat mixture into two quart shallow casserole dishes.
10. Spread the potato mixture evenly over the top of each dish.
11. Bake until golden brown and bubbling (about 45-50 minutes).
12. Let stand for 10 minutes before serving.
